scripts.compile: pnpm run clean:dist && pnpm --dir ../.. exec electron-builder build --projectDir ./apps/desktop --config ./electron-builder.mjs
scripts.lint: oxlint electron-builder.mjs playwright.config.ts scripts tests types/preload-api.d.ts --config ../../oxlint.desktop.config.ts
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint electron-builder.mjs playwright.config.ts scripts tests types/preload-api.d.ts --config ../../oxlint.desktop.config.ts --fix
scripts.lint:type-aware: oxlint electron-builder.mjs playwright.config.ts scripts tests types/preload-api.d.ts --config ../../oxlint.desktop.config.ts --type-aware
scripts.lint:typecheck: oxlint electron-builder.mjs playwright.config.ts scripts tests types/preload-api.d.ts --config ../../oxlint.desktop.config.ts --type-aware --type-check
